note: Regulated-trade rate-book tasks. HoneyDone is an insured Florida handyman, not a licensed contractor. REFER = licensed trade + permit, always refer out. VERIFY = gray scope, confirm on site and refer if it needs new wiring, a permit, or structural work. Generated from the ratebook pricing run; edit via the pricing workflow, not by hand.
